title: selaginella moritziana
intro: Selaginella moritziana, also known as the resurrection plant, is a type of small, delicate, and low-growing fern-like plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health issues such as wounds, fever, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Selaginella moritziana include its ability to improve immune function, reduce oxidative stress, and protect against cell damage, which may contribute to its potential in preventing certain diseases. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be applied topically to the skin to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
